issues: Supporting text under main metrics (e.g., 'Last 24h', 'Today's High') has low contrast and is small.
Cards feel a bit flat despite subtle shadows; lacks a stronger sense of visual depth or modern surface treatment.
The design lacks unique visual polish and depth, making cards and interactive elements feel somewhat flat.
The overall design is clean and functional but lacks a distinctive visual identity or 'wow' factor to elevate it to world-class.
Y-axis labels on the 'Portfolio Performance' chart are very faint and difficult to read.
strengths: Clean, consistent dark theme color palette that is appropriate for a finance application.
High data completeness with realistic values, populated tables, and a clear chart.
Clean, legible typography with good use of tabular numbers, contributing to a professional feel.
Excellent data completeness and realistic data rendering across all components.
Excellent dark theme with appropriate and consistent use of accent colors (green/red for deltas).
specific_improvements: Refine the top ticker bar's presentation to be more subtle or integrate it into a dedicated market overview section to reduce visual clutter.
Introduce more subtle depth cues (e.g., soft, multi-directional shadows or very slight inner borders) for cards and interactive elements.
Enhance card depth by exploring more pronounced, yet still subtle, shadows or by introducing subtle inner highlights/borders.
Increase the contrast and size of the chart's Y-axis labels for better readability.
Implement clear hover states for all interactive elements (buttons, table rows, cards) to improve discoverability and user feedback.
